recentTweets.text: RT @HouseDemocrats: John Lewis was more than our esteemed friend and colleague, he was a force to be reckoned with and a powerful civil rig…

John Lewis committed his life to advancing the voting protections and civil rights we now see the Trump Administration rolling back. 
 
Today, we honor his legacy by carrying his work forward and continuing to make good trouble, necessary trouble. https://t.co/nu9ANsnYGw

While @potus strips the Voting Rights Act, and terrorizes Black communities - @TheBlackCaucus members will continue to be the strongest and most qualified to represent their communities. 

READ: https://t.co/qtaaD0HCmF

Secretary Hegseth has consistently withheld promotions to qualified military officials, even after they were reviewed, vetted, and approved - and he won't tell us why. Unsurprisingly, most of those fired or removed are Black and/or women. 
 
Diversity is our strength, despite https://t.co/eI5Y8Up06n

Each winter in the #SouthSound, we understand the dread of 4pm sunsets. 

Yesterday, I voted to ditch the switch and pass @PattyMurray’s Sunshine Protection Act, giving Washington families, commuters, and local businesses hours of daylight back to enjoy in the wintertime.
Joined @CityofTumwater to tour the Ticknor Farms Properties as 200 acres of farmland is set to be acquired by the city to support endangered species. https://t.co/nQTMPIO5XB

Stopped by @Well80Brewhouse in Olympia with @BrewersAssoc & the Washington Brewers Guild to hear the concerns of #SouthSound craft brewers. As Co-Chair of the Small Brewers Caucus, I will keep working to advance policies that strengthen the industry for brewers, farmers, and https://t.co/AhrP2ntDoL

I met with #SouthSound students and families from the Indian American STAR Foundation, a local youth organization offering programs in arts, culture, and education. Thank you for sharing your stories and elevating the importance of leadership opportunities in schools. https://t.co/Ps3OnWa2DJ

Whether it be the price of gas, groceries, housing, or healthcare - people want stability. 

I brought together small business owners, seniors, military families, and more from across the #SouthSound to hear their concerns about the rising cost of living and discuss potential https://t.co/ouXADB6rWq
Thousands across the #SouthSound will use the Fishing Wars Memorial Bridge to connect communities and businesses. I’m proud to have secured $7.6m in federal grants to #deliverfortheSouthSound.

Congratulations to Suhaas, the winner of our inaugural STEM Award Program in #WA10!

I am excited to support this program, and encourage students like Suhaas to explore their passions and encourage creativity in the computer science field.

Read more about the winning project https://t.co/ganPYB0yNh

Toured the new Maritime | 253 Skills Center, before doors open this fall. This project uses federal funding I secured to serve 11th and 12th graders across the #SouthSound
 
Training and dual college credits will allow students to explore careers and support our local maritime https://t.co/qZdSi0kqhx

Seattle hosts our final World Cup match tonight for @USMNT! What an honor it is to show fans and teams from around the world the beauty of the #PNW. 

Go Team USA! The #SouthSound is excited to cheer you on. 🇺🇸

On this 250th #IndependenceDay, we celebrate our democratic values - how far our country has come and how far we have to go.

Wishing everyone a happy and safe Fourth of July! https://t.co/eVP8cpnVze
Joined the United Way Pierce County team and discussed their Center for Strong Families and how they assisted #SouthSound residents impacted by December 2025 flooding. https://t.co/OSHSvvl3p6

Met with the current class of Vision Step Team, a non-profit dedicated to youth empowerment through the art of stepping. It was so great to meet with these young women and hear from the new generation of leaders in the #SouthSound. https://t.co/3JNERgXrfE
Happy 150th to my alma mater CAU!

Toured the Chehalis Tribe’s Fish Hatchery to hear more about the operations & renovations that I have requested federal funding for. It was great to meet with the team and discuss how I can #delieverfortheSouthSound, support the tribe, and protect our local salmon population. https://t.co/TRu1azoc5b

I attended a commemoration of the nation's 250th anniversary with @_lifecenter and the Council of Ukrainian Churches. As we celebrate liberty, democracy, and justice, I am proud to stand with Ukraine, both in the #SouthSound and across the globe, as they fight for our shared https://t.co/wDzvKxkMfr

Toured the @MultiCareHealth Capital Medical Center to meet with their team, who serve over 30,000 patients a year. We talked about the impacts of Trump's Medicaid cuts and their new Breast Center which aims to be able to serve more women. https://t.co/kHQYtZuT22
Voter suppression is unconstitutional. Good ruling for WA State. Every vote must count. Period.

Spoke to students at the VALOR Center, a hub that supports veterans and servicemembers at @SPSCC. We spoke about their concerns and experiences using VA education services, and how we can continue to support our veterans – especially those living in the #SouthSound. https://t.co/rPeAWWFayy

Happy #EqualityDay, celebrating the landmark SCOTUS decisions that made marriage equality the law of the land. 
 
Regardless of the Administration or who sits on the court, I am committed to making sure every couple has the freedom to marry.

RT @NewDemCoalition: The GOP needs to starting holding Trump accountable to the promises he made to the American people.

New Dem Whip @Rep…

RT @NewDemCoalition: Trump's reflecting pool failure is a perfect example of how he's handled everything his entire presidency.

Step 1: Fi…

Today is the 76th Anniversary of the start of the Korean War. We must honor and recognize the sacrifice that it takes to protect our freedom and democracy. The #SouthSound is grateful to all our veterans. https://t.co/Fze6M7bKTm

Toured the @nucorcorp facility in #WA10. As the largest steel producer and recycler in North America, we spoke about their role in supporting #SouthSound infrastructure projects, and how to build even more pipelines to support their local workforce needs. https://t.co/5Notld6gXg

Four years ago, Roe v. Wade was overturned – ripping away the right to choose from women across the country.

@HouseDemocrats and @ReproCaucus will always fight back to ensure women can receive the healthcare they need.

RT @ReproCaucus: Four years.

Every day since #Dobbs has only reminded us of the urgency & the stakes of our fight.

Today, we honor those…

It is cleare…

.@POTUS is setting fire to a bipartisan housing bill that would make life more affordable for Americans.

It is clearer than ever before, that Trump and his Administration do not care about lowering costs or supporting the American people.

RT @CityOfSumnerWA: Thank you, Congresswoman, for taking the time to stop by. Can’t wait to finish Heritage Park!
Toured Heritage Park, and several small businesses in @CityOfSumnerWA to hear more about how we can invest in the park, and boost the surrounding business district. https://t.co/2AW9ZAhlyq
Met with the Northwest Chapter of @PVA1946 to discuss how Congress can better support our veterans – especially those living in the #SouthSound. https://t.co/l1vXbWzNIe
Wishing all the dads in the #SouthSound, and across the country, a Happy Father’s Day! https://t.co/uyOMg1ar1Q

Today, we celebrate #Juneteenth to mark the true independence of every American. It is an important reminder that we must continue to uplift the principles of liberty and justice for all.

Happy Juneteenth! https://t.co/3xmnsExW3I

Cut the ribbon to celebrate the latest @LiveMH homes at JBLM. By December 2027, Meriweather Landing will be home for 200+ #SouthSound families.

To support our troops, we have to make sure their families have a safe place to live. https://t.co/2lP46QNLUr
RT @SPSCC: SPSCC was honored to welcome @RepStricklandWA to our VALOR Center for a meaningful conversation with students utilizing Veteran…

The @BIAofWA stopped by my office to discuss solutions to build more housing.

#WA10 is one of the fastest-growing regions in the country, and more affordable housing is one of my top priorities. https://t.co/ibrogSX4n9

Joined the Tacoma-Pierce County Black Collective to speak directly about the attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and what it means for the #SouthSound.

@POTUS and @HouseGOP continue to threaten Black Americans. https://t.co/qjeCHVc5gt

Today is the 59th anniversary #LovingvVirginia. Decades later, love of all kinds needs to be protected and respected.

Happy #LovingDay.
As Co-Chair of the Grid Innovation Caucus, it was good to meet with the GridWise team and discuss ways Congress can continue improving our nation’s grid infrastructure. https://t.co/NU9RepvRoT
RT @RepSarahElfreth: It’s 2026, but the fight to stop renaming our military bases after Confederate soldiers continues. I had to speak up a…

Great meeting with @ATUComm members in Local 1765 and Local 758!

Public transit provides critical options that Americans rely on. Proud to support the BUILD America 250 Act that is investing in our communities, local transit access, and jobs. https://t.co/A0vVlIWnBt
It was good to meet with the team at Trouves St. Ann's, a facility working to provide behavioral health services and housing stability to those in need in the #SouthSound. https://t.co/ltzTIhmZJr
Today, we honor the veterans on the beaches of Normandy who paved the way to freedom during WWII. Their sacrifice for our country will always be remembered. https://t.co/df4puMnrvc

RT @jamiedupree: A major defense policy bill approved by a House panel has two notable name provisions.

One makes Trump's 'Department of W…

My amendment to block military bases from being named after Confederate traitors passed, but not without opposition from @HASCRepublicans.

The other side of the aisle have shown us exactly who they are. READ: https://t.co/B8M06e2IPZ

Last night, my amendment to block military bases from being named after Confederate traitors passed.

Our servicemembers who dedicate their lives to our nation should not have to work under the namesakes of hatred, bigotry, and racism.

Improving the lives of our servicemembers and their families continues to be my top priority. That includes protecting them from bases that honor Confederate traitors.

READ: 
https://t.co/UP8pmORBrS

RT @AnthonyAdragna: Also news: House Armed Services Committee members approve a @RepStricklandWA amendment to revert to non-Confederate mil…

Our American military promotion system has been crafted, tested, and proven by our servicemembers, @RepNancyMace.

People who sit behind desks can't dictate what happens on the battlefield - Secretary Hegseth, stop blocking promotions. https://t.co/nNHy1A5OGP

Secretary Hegseth continues to deny earned military promotions to our most qualified and patriotic.
 
Enough is enough.

RT @reporterjoe: It’s HASC’s NDAA markup day!

Dem @RepStricklandWA told me her amendment would check Pete Hegseth’s meddling with military…
Happy #Pride Month to the #SouthSound and to the nation! https://t.co/kFo1g0JKNe

This #AANHPI Heritage Month, I'm recognizing @apcc96 and the good work that they continue to do for the #SouthSound. 

Just in 2025, I joined the Cultural Center to open their new facility. I am excited to see what they do next! READ: https://t.co/1mqUWkMJ8R https://t.co/BSC6Dq0r4o

With $850K in federal funding, I'm #deliveringfortheSouthSound and helping Tenino reinforce the local meat supply chain and expand food production options.
 
READ: https://t.co/cQ212ybR6h https://t.co/ffjmllGSCV

I'm with the Washington Hospitality Association at Farrellis in Lacey! It was good to discuss how we can continue energizing our local and state-wide economies, especially with #FIFA2026 right around the corner. https://t.co/ZS64eVlywB

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
